data.body: parse_failing_tests_from_output in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/red-zone.sh uses ^FAIL: (line start anchor) to extract failing test names. Most test files in tests/scripts/ use 2-space indented FAIL output (echo "  FAIL: test_name"), making them invisible to the parser. When no test names are parsed, the fail-safe treats ALL failures as blocking, defeating RED zone tolerance. Fix: support indented FAIL lines (e.g., grep -oE '(^|\s)FAIL: [a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*').
